title: Grofers Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Grofers Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Grofers Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Grofers Logistics:
Grofers Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
